디도서 2:1.content: But say the things which fit sound doctrine,

디도서 2:2.content: that older men should be temperate, sensible, sober minded, sound in faith, in love, and in perseverance:

디도서 2:3.content: and that older women likewise be reverent in behavior, not slanderers nor enslaved to much wine, teachers of that which is good,

디도서 2:4.content: that they may train the young wives to love their husbands, to love their children,

디도서 2:5.content: to be sober minded, chaste, workers at home, kind, being in subjection to their own husbands, that God’s word may not be blasphemed.

디도서 2:6.content: Likewise, exhort the younger men to be sober minded.

디도서 2:7.content: In all things be showing yourself an example of good works. In your teaching, be showing integrity, seriousness, incorruptibility,

디도서 2:8.content: and soundness of speech that can’t be condemned, that he who opposes you may be ashamed, having no evil thing to say about us.

디도서 2:9.content: Exhort servants to be in subjection to their own masters and to be well-pleasing in all things, not contradicting,

디도서 2:10.content: not stealing, but showing all good fidelity, that they may adorn the doctrine of God, our Savior, in all things.

디도서 2:11.content: For the grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all men,

디도서 2:12.content: instructing us to the intent that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we would live soberly, righteously, and godly in this present age;

디도서 2:13.content: looking for the blessed hope and appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior, Jesus Christ,

디도서 2:14.content: who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify for himself a people for his own possession, zealous for good works.

디도서 2:15.content: Say these things and exhort and reprove with all authority. Let no one despise you.
